message:
security(node): constant-time comparison and crypto hardening in 7 modules

Replaces direct string equality (== / !=) with ct_eq() for all
security-sensitive hash and MAC comparisons, preventing timing
side-channel attacks:

- incident_bundle_retention.rs: integrity hash verification in
  store_bundle and verify_bundle (+test for same-length tampering)
- incident_lab.rs: trace integrity hash and replay digest checks
  (+test for same-length hash corruption)
- time_travel.rs: snapshot integrity verification and frame digest
  validation (+test for same-length digest tampering)
- interface_hash.rs: hash comparison using ct_eq instead of
  eq_ignore_ascii_case
- verifier_economy/mod.rs: public key comparison during verifier
  registration

Also includes two targeted hardening fixes:
- threshold_sig.rs: Reorder signature verification to occur BEFORE
  duplicate key check. Previously, an invalid signature could poison
  the seen-set, causing valid signatures from the same key to be
  incorrectly rejected as duplicates.
- zk_attestation.rs: Replace direct + with saturating_add for
  timestamp arithmetic to prevent overflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
